# 高精度乘法

```cpp
const double PI=acos(-1.0);
struct Complex{
    double x,y;
    Complex(double x=0,double y=0):x(x),y(y){}
    Complex operator +(const Complex &t)const{
        return {x+t.x,y+t.y};
    }
    Complex operator -(const Complex &t)const{
        return {x-t.x,y-t.y}; 
    }
    Complex operator *(const Complex &t)const{
        return {x*t.x-y*t.y,x*t.y+y*t.x};
    }
};
int rev[N],bit,tot;
void fft(vector<Complex> &a,int inv){
    for(int i=0;i<tot;i++){
        if(i<rev[i])swap(a[i],a[rev[i]]);
    }
    for(int mid=1;mid<tot;mid<<=1){
        Complex w1(cos(PI/mid),inv*sin(PI/mid));
        for(int i=0;i<tot;i+=mid*2){
            Complex wk(1,0);
            for(int j=0;j<mid;j++,wk=wk*w1){
                auto x=a[i+j],y=wk*a[i+j+mid];
                a[i+j]=x+y,a[i+j+mid]=x-y;
            }
        }
    }
}
vector<int> mul(vector<int> &A,vector<int> &B){
    vector<Complex> a,b;
    int n=A.size()-1,m=B.size()-1;
    for(int i=0;i<=n;i++)a.push_back(A[i]);
    for(int i=0;i<=m;i++)b.push_back(B[i]);
    while((1<<bit)<n+m+1)bit++;
    tot=1<<bit;
    while(a.size()<tot)a.push_back(0);
    while(b.size()<tot)b.push_back(0);
    for(int i=0;i<tot;i++)rev[i]=(rev[i>>1]>>1)|((i&1)<<(bit-1));
    fft(a,1),fft(b,1);
    for(int i=0;i<tot;i++)a[i]=a[i]*b[i];
    fft(a,-1);
    vector<int> C;
    for(int i=0,t=0;i<tot||t;i++){
        if(i<tot)t+=(int)(a[i].x/tot+0.5);
        C.push_back(t%10);
        t/=10;
    }
    while(C.size()>1&&C.back()==0)C.pop_back();
    return C;
}
void solve(){
    string s,t;
    cin>>s>>t;
    vector<int> A,B;
    for(int i=s.size()-1;i>=0;i--)A.push_back(s[i]-'0');
    for(int i=t.size()-1;i>=0;i--)B.push_back(t[i]-'0');
    auto ans=mul(A,B);
    for(int i=ans.size()-1;i>=0;i--)cout<<ans[i];
}
```
